package rulefixtures

// scenario for path_split_base_only: `path.Split(...)` when only the base name is used.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule622NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario622Negative(records []Rule622NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
